input.description: Read exact file contents needed for RAG implementation
input.prompt:
Read and return the EXACT full content (every line) of these files in d:\intelligent-coding-assistant\backend:

1. src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/service/ChatService.java
2. src/main/resources/application.yml
3. src/main/resources/schema.sql
4. pom.xml
5. src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/controller/ChatController.java
6. src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/dto/MessageVO.java
7. src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/entity/Message.java
8. src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/config/LlmConfig.java

Return the complete file content for each, no summarizing.
